title: The Valuation Map as a Depth Functor

analysis.object: T760: The Valuation Map as a Depth Functor depth analysis

valuation_map.description: val: K^* -> R -- takes multiplication to addition (log structure)

depth_of_trop.description: trop takes EML-0 algebraic cycles to EML-0 tropical cycles -- depth PRESERVING

depth_of_analytification.description: analytification: EML-0 algebraic -> EML-3 Berkovich -- depth INCREASES by 3

delta_d_for_analytification.description: Delta_d(analytification) = +3: algebraic to analytic adds 3 depth levels

descent_delta_d.description: Descent = inverse: EML-3 Berkovich -> EML-0 algebraic -- Delta_d = -3
descent_delta_d.reason: Inverse of +3 analytification -- requires TYPE3 crossing

t760_theorem.description: T760: analytification is Delta_d=+3. Algebraization (descent) is Delta_d=-3. The depth jump is the barrier. Descent crosses TYPE3 in both directions.
t760_theorem.reason: Depth functor analysis quantifies the barrier precisely

analysis.theorem: T760: The Valuation Map as a Depth Functor (S1039).

key_theorem: T760: The Valuation Map as a Depth Functor (S1039).
